runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP Targeted QA - v8.11.184 dashboard and AI state
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_EAfnBF9W49oPUsAVn1cWwz8TAYZw was READY for alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version returned version 8.11.184, Next.js 16.1.6, release tag v8.11.184, commit 02a05eba19b7be4d9cc1d19bc9af015d53c6cdce, and GitLab pipeline 2536955714
/api/health returned success=true with database, cache, and ai services connected
Landing page rendered and the dashboard CTA opened /dashboard
Dashboard rendered OTel snapshot state for 18 servers, including total/online/warning/risk/offline counts, system resources, and resource warning top list
AI assistant sidebar opened from the dashboard and showed AI Engine Ready
AI prompt '현재 서버 전체 상태를 요약해줘' returned a monitoring-grounded summary through /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 with correct total/status counts and the key cache-redis/api-was risk servers

AI prompt 'Vercel BFF와 Cloud Run AI Engine 책임 경계를 알려줘. KRL 근거가 있으면 함께 알려줘.' returned a visible response, but it used the general conversation path instead of internal KRL evidence and leaked raw tool-call/reasoning markers
AI prompt 'OpenManager OTel 데이터 SSOT와 18대 서버 상태 판단 기준을 KRL 근거로 요약해줘.' returned a monitoring-server-health response with correct live status counts, but did not surface the requested KRL/SSOT basis
AI-related network requests returned HTTP 200 for wake-up, health, and /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2
Vercel usage check passed with effective 13.3467 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, and chargeCount 11571 for the current billing period
skippedSurfaces: Full release route pack, OAuth provider callback, mobile viewport, Reporter Agent, Analyst Agent advanced tabs, and Vision image upload UI were not included in this targeted state run
Cloud Run admin monitoring endpoints were not called directly; Vercel /api/health and AI assistant network traffic were used as production-path evidence

Normal locator-based typing/clicking for the third AI prompt was not available in the active Playwright MCP namespace, so a scripted DOM submit was used and its console side-effect was recorded separately

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after production state QA; effective 13.3467 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 11571.

artifacts.label: Vercel Playwright MCP AI state evidence

expertAssessments.rationale: Vercel production deployment is READY, version/health endpoints are coherent, database/cache/ai health checks are connected, AI network responses were 200, and Vercel usage remains within guardrail.
Core AI sidebar status summary works, but project architecture/KRL questions can fall into a general route and the visible answer leaked raw tool-call/reasoning artifacts.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add/adjust routing tests for Vercel BFF/Cloud Run and OTel SSOT KRL prompts, then sanitize streamed model text before rendering.

expertAssessments.rationale: AI status counts and top risk servers matched the dashboard, but aggregate CPU/Memory/Disk values differed from the visible dashboard resources in both sampled status prompts.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Define whether dashboard and AI use the same aggregation source. If yes, fix parity; if not, expose the aggregation semantics in assistant metadata.

expertAssessments.rationale: The run used real browser rendering, Vercel MCP deployment lookup, network evidence, and durable QA artifacts; a follow-up should convert these prompts into locator-based Playwright regression coverage.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add user-like Playwright regression prompts for KRL platform-boundary routing and raw marker sanitization.

pendingImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant should route Vercel BFF / Cloud Run boundary questions to internal KRL evidence
pendingImprovements.note: Playwright MCP production QA showed the platform-boundary prompt was handled as a general conversation/web-style answer, not internal KRL evidence. The OTel SSOT/KRL follow-up also collapsed to monitoring-server-health without surfacing the requested KRL basis.

pendingImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant leaked raw tool-call markers and reasoning JSON in visible response
pendingImprovements.note: The visible answer contained <|tool_call_begin|>, 'Nothing to process.', and a reasoning JSON block. Streamed assistant text must be sanitized before rendering.

notes: This run validates the deployed production state, not the newest local HEAD. Production is v8.11.184 / 02a05eba19b7be4d9cc1d19bc9af015d53c6cdce, while local HEAD at QA time was 760ca1e0370aa2fcc019abd844137316c945d312.
Platform-level state is healthy: Vercel READY, /api/version coherent, /api/health connected, AI stream network calls 200, and Vercel usage billed 0.0000 USD.

Dashboard state and AI count/status summaries are usable. Initial observed state was total 18 / online 16 / warning 1 / risk 1 / offline 0; refreshed state was total 18 / online 17 / warning 1 / risk 0 / offline 0.

AI aggregate resource values differed from visible dashboard values: 45/54/36 vs AI 39/49/38 on the first prompt, then 41/53/33 vs AI 36/47/35 on the follow-up. This is a state-parity warning unless different aggregation semantics are intentionally used.

A console TypeError was captured during scripted DOM submit for the third prompt; because it followed a non-standard DOM submit workaround, it is recorded as evidence but not promoted as the primary user-flow failure in this run.
